title: REO — Built Like It Used To Be
excerpt: The Runabout. Gas, mechanical, body-on-frame — engineered for 500,000 miles. Starting at $21,500. Reserve yours for $25, fully refundable.
content_html:
Introducing the

Runabout

America's New Affordable Truck

$21,500+

Reservations Open · $25 · Refundable

Reserve Your Place

Body-On-Frame

Architecture

Mechanical 4WD

Drive

Gasoline I4

Powertrain

6-spd MT / AT

Transmission

~600 mi / tank

Range

500,000 mi

Powertrain life

Texas, USA

Assembly

No Dealers

Sales

Runabout T4X

Three variants. One platform.

Seats

2

Doors

2

Signature

Steel Drop-Side Flatbed

Starting

$21,500

Where we’re going.

  1. Now

    Reservations open

    $25 holds your place — fully refundable. Position set by reservation time.

  2. Q4 2026

    Models revealed

    The production design and full lineup, unveiled — see exactly what you’re reserving.

  3. 2027

    Pilot builds & validation

    Pre-production trucks built, tested, and certified to federal standards.

  4. 2028

    Order book & configurator

    Reservations convert to orders in priority sequence — configure yours, earliest first.

  5. Late 2028 / 2029

    First deliveries

    Trucks reach driveways in reservation order. Earliest in, first out.

Timeline targets · subject to change

A real truck, by the numbers.

FIG.01 — SPEC SHEET

0 lb

Payload

0 lb

Max towing

0"

Length

0"

Width

0"

Height

~0 mpg

Fuel economy

~0 lb

Curb weight

0 gal

Fuel tank

Engineering targets · subject to final validation

How it stacks up.

FIG.02 — HEAD-TO-HEAD

Competitor figures approximate · for comparison only

01POWERTRAIN

Why Gas

90% of new cars sold still run on gas — so that's what we build. Coming late is deliberate: proven technology over the newest, putting more trucks in more American hands at a lower price.

~600 mi range · 5-min refuel

02ENGINEERING

Reliability by Design

Not a retro rehash — an entirely new vehicle with one constraint above all others: reliability. A naturally aspirated gas four, body-on-frame, mechanical 4WD, built to run past a half-million miles.

500,000-mile powertrain

03INTERFACE

Physical Controls

Levers, rockers, and real analog gauges. One small screen for diagnostics and CarPlay — nothing more. No subscriptions. No feature locks. Ever.

Mechanical-first cabin

04OWNERSHIP

Right to Repair

Every panel off in under five minutes with common tools. Plain-English diagnostics on a $30 scanner. A 20-year public parts catalog at fair prices. No parts-pairing — in writing.

Owner-serviceable

05SALES

No Dealers

Sold direct online. No dealer markups or unnecessary fees.

No dealers means more money in your pocket

06ORIGIN

Built in Texas

Designed, certified, and assembled in America. The story isn't the badge — it's the supply chain, true at the factory gate.

32.7767° N · 96.7970° W

A letter from REO

The buyers didn't leave. The products did.

There's a vehicle missing from the American market — small enough for a real garage, cheap enough to skip the seven-year loan, built well enough to outlast it. Here's why we're bringing REO back to build it.

A legacy in the making for over 120 years.

  1. 1901

    Ransom E. Olds builds the Curved Dash Runabout — America’s first mass-produced car. $650, about $25,000 today.

  2. 1905

    Pushed out of Oldsmobile, Olds founds REO under his own initials.

  3. 1915

    The REO Speed Wagon arrives — the ancestor of the modern pickup.

  4. 1975

    REO closes after seventy years of honest American trucks.

  5. 2026

    REO returns to build the affordable American truck no one else will.

Direct Parts + OEM-Sponsored Community

No automaker has ever done this — and that’s exactly the problem. We’re the first to put parts and community in the open, because this truck should belong to the people who drive it, not to a profit machine built on gatekeeping. We earn through transparency and relationships that work both ways. Here, the OEM is your friend.

01 · MARKETPLACE

Direct Parts

Right to repair, stocked.

  • Vetted sellers — approved through our process, not the highest bidder.
  • Real prices, published take rate. No dealer gatekeeping, no parts-pairing.
  • A public catalog guaranteed for 20 years, sold straight to owners.

02 · COMMUNITY

The Owners’ Club

Run by us. We actually listen.

  • A forum we own and moderate — not a neglected Facebook group.
  • Owners shape what we build next; the best ideas ship.
  • Honest answers from the team, in public, on the record.

In the News

Coverage from the field

Field Issue

Rep the revival

Classic Snap Back

$27.50

Structured black snapback with the REO mark up front.

  • One size
  • Adjustable snap closure

Classic Tee

$27.50

First-run REO tee for the people bringing simple trucks back.

  • Heavy cotton feel
  • Classic fit

Size

Tech Snap Back

$27.50

Lightweight technical cap for shop days, trail days, and long hauls.

  • One size
  • Tech fabric

Contact

Contact us.

Press, suppliers, partners, and the merely curious — we read every message and answer fast. Want a truck? Reserve yours for $25.

sentences.en: Trucks reach driveways in reservation order.
sentences.zh: 卡车按预订顺序到达车道。

sentences.zh: 从数字来看，这是一辆真正的卡车。

blocks.html_en: 90% of new cars sold still run on gas — so that's what we build. Coming late is deliberate: proven technology over the newest, putting more trucks in more American hands at a lower price.

sentences.en: 90% of new cars sold still run on gas — so that's what we build.
sentences.zh: 售出的新车中 90% 仍然使用汽油——这就是我们所生产的产品。

sentences.en: Coming late is deliberate: proven technology over the newest, putting more trucks in more American hands at a lower price.
sentences.zh: 迟到是故意的：经过验证的技术优于最新的技术，以更低的价格将更多卡车交到更多美国人手中。
~600 英里航程 · 5 分钟加油

blocks.html_en: Not a retro rehash — an entirely new vehicle with one constraint above all others: reliability. A naturally aspirated gas four, body-on-frame, mechanical 4WD, built to run past a half-million miles.

sentences.en: Not a retro rehash — an entirely new vehicle with one constraint above all others: reliability.
sentences.zh: 这不是一种复古的翻版——一种全新的车辆，只有一个最重要的限制：可靠性。

sentences.en: A naturally aspirated gas four, body-on-frame, mechanical 4WD, built to run past a half-million miles.
sentences.zh: 自然吸气式四轮驱动、车身框架式机械四轮驱动车，行驶里程超过 50 万英里。

blocks.html_en: Levers, rockers, and real analog gauges. One small screen for diagnostics and CarPlay — nothing more. No subscriptions. No feature locks. Ever.

sentences.en: Levers, rockers, and real analog gauges.
sentences.zh: 杠杆、摇杆和真实的模拟仪表。

sentences.en: One small screen for diagnostics and CarPlay — nothing more.
sentences.zh: 一个用于诊断和 CarPlay 的小屏幕——仅此而已。

blocks.html_en: Every panel off in under five minutes with common tools. Plain-English diagnostics on a $30 scanner. A 20-year public parts catalog at fair prices. No parts-pairing — in writing.

sentences.en: Every panel off in under five minutes with common tools.
sentences.zh: 使用常用工具可在五分钟内完成每个面板的安装。
在 30 美元的扫描仪上进行简单的英语诊断。

sentences.en: A 20-year public parts catalog at fair prices.
sentences.zh: 价格公道的 20 年公共零件目录。
没有零件配对——以书面形式。

blocks.html_en: Sold direct online. No dealer markups or unnecessary fees.

sentences.en: No dealer markups or unnecessary fees.
sentences.zh: 没有经销商加价或不必要的费用。

blocks.html_en: No dealers means more money in your pocket

sentences.en: No dealers means more money in your pocket
sentences.zh: 没有经销商意味着您口袋里有更多钱

blocks.html_en: Designed, certified, and assembled in America. The story isn't the badge — it's the supply chain, true at the factory gate.

sentences.en: Designed, certified, and assembled in America.
sentences.zh: 在美国设计、认证和组装。

sentences.en: The story isn't the badge — it's the supply chain, true at the factory gate.
sentences.zh: 故事不是徽章——而是供应链，在工厂门口都是如此。

blocks.html_en: The buyers didn't leave. The products did.

There's a vehicle missing from the American market — small enough for a real garage, cheap enough to skip the seven-year loan, built well enough to outlast it. Here's why we're bringing REO back to build it.

sentences.en: There's a vehicle missing from the American market — small enough for a real garage, cheap enough to skip the seven-year loan, built well enough to outlast it.
sentences.zh: 美国市场上缺少一种车辆——足够小，足以容纳一个真正的车库，足够便宜，可以跳过七年期贷款，建造得足够好，可以比它更耐用。

sentences.en: Here's why we're bringing REO back to build it.
sentences.zh: 这就是我们让 REO 回来建造它的原因。

blocks.html_en: A legacy in the making for over 120 years.

sentences.en: A legacy in the making for over 120 years.
sentences.zh: 120 多年来一直在酝酿的遗产。

blocks.html_en:
• 1901

    Ransom E. Olds builds the Curved Dash Runabout — America’s first mass-produced car. $650, about $25,000 today.

sentences.en: Olds builds the Curved Dash Runabout — America’s first mass-produced car. $650, about $25,000 today.
sentences.zh: 奥兹制造了 Curved Dash Runabout——美国第一辆量产汽车。 650 美元，今天约 25,000 美元。

blocks.html_en: Ransom E. Olds builds the Curved Dash Runabout — America’s first mass-produced car. $650, about $25,000 today.

sentences.en: Olds builds the Curved Dash Runabout — America’s first mass-produced car. $650, about $25,000 today.
sentences.zh: 奥兹制造了 Curved Dash Runabout——美国第一辆量产汽车。 650 美元，今天约 25,000 美元。

blocks.html_en:
• 1905

    Pushed out of Oldsmobile, Olds founds REO under his own initials.

sentences.en: 1905Pushed out of Oldsmobile, Olds founds REO under his own initials.
sentences.zh: 1905 年，奥兹被赶出奥兹莫比尔，并以自己名字的首字母缩写创立了 REO。

blocks.html_en: Pushed out of Oldsmobile, Olds founds REO under his own initials.

sentences.en: Pushed out of Oldsmobile, Olds founds REO under his own initials.
sentences.zh: 奥兹莫比尔被赶出奥兹莫比尔后，奥兹以自己名字的首字母缩写创立了 REO。

blocks.html_en:
• 1915

    The REO Speed Wagon arrives — the ancestor of the modern pickup.

sentences.en: 1915The REO Speed Wagon arrives — the ancestor of the modern pickup.
sentences.zh: 1915 年 REO Speed Wagon 面世——现代皮卡的鼻祖。

blocks.html_en: The REO Speed Wagon arrives — the ancestor of the modern pickup.

sentences.en: The REO Speed Wagon arrives — the ancestor of the modern pickup.
sentences.zh: REO Speed Wagon 登场——现代皮卡的鼻祖。

blocks.html_en:
• 1975

    REO closes after seventy years of honest American trucks.

sentences.en: 1975REO closes after seventy years of honest American trucks.
sentences.zh: 1975REO 在诚实的美国卡车七十年后关闭。

blocks.html_en: REO closes after seventy years of honest American trucks.

sentences.en: REO closes after seventy years of honest American trucks.
sentences.zh: REO 在诚实的美国卡车七十年后关闭。

blocks.html_en:
• 2026

    REO returns to build the affordable American truck no one else will.

sentences.en: 2026REO returns to build the affordable American truck no one else will.
sentences.zh: 2026REO 回归，打造无人能敌的经济实惠的美国卡车。

blocks.html_en: REO returns to build the affordable American truck no one else will.

sentences.en: REO returns to build the affordable American truck no one else will.
sentences.zh: REO 回归，打造无人能敌的价格实惠的美国卡车。
直接零件 + OEM 赞助的社区

blocks.html_en: No automaker has ever done this — and that’s exactly the problem. We’re the first to put parts and community in the open, because this truck should belong to the people who drive it, not to a profit machine built on gatekeeping. We earn through transparency and relationships that work both ways. Here, the OEM is your friend.

sentences.en: No automaker has ever done this — and that’s exactly the problem.
sentences.zh: 还没有一家汽车制造商这样做过——而这正是问题所在。

sentences.en: We’re the first to put parts and community in the open, because this truck should belong to the people who drive it, not to a profit machine built on gatekeeping.
sentences.zh: 我们是第一个将零部件和社区公开的人，因为这辆卡车应该属于驾驶它的人，而不是建立在看门人基础上的利润机器。

sentences.en: We earn through transparency and relationships that work both ways.
sentences.zh: 我们通过透明度和双向关系来赚钱。

sentences.en: Here, the OEM is your friend.
sentences.zh: 在这里，OEM 是您的朋友。

blocks.html_en: • Vetted sellers — approved through our process, not the highest bidder.

sentences.en: Vetted sellers — approved through our process, not the highest bidder.
sentences.zh: 经过审查的卖家——通过我们的流程获得批准，而不是最高出价者。

blocks.html_en: • Real prices, published take rate. No dealer gatekeeping, no parts-pairing.

sentences.zh: 没有经销商把关，没有零件配对。

blocks.html_en: • A public catalog guaranteed for 20 years, sold straight to owners.

sentences.en: A public catalog guaranteed for 20 years, sold straight to owners.
sentences.zh: 公共目录保修 20 年，直接出售给业主。

blocks.html_en: • A forum we own and moderate — not a neglected Facebook group.

sentences.en: A forum we own and moderate — not a neglected Facebook group.
sentences.zh: 我们拥有并管理的论坛，而不是被忽视的 Facebook 群组。

blocks.html_en: • Owners shape what we build next; the best ideas ship.

sentences.en: Owners shape what we build next; the best ideas ship.
sentences.zh: 业主决定我们接下来要建造什么；最好的想法船。

blocks.html_en: • Honest answers from the team, in public, on the record.

sentences.en: Honest answers from the team, in public, on the record.
sentences.zh: 团队在公开场合、记录在案的诚实回答。

blocks.html_en: Structured black snapback with the REO mark up front.

sentences.en: Structured black snapback with the REO mark up front.
sentences.zh: 结构化黑色后扣，正面带有 REO 标记。

blocks.html_en: First-run REO tee for the people bringing simple trucks back.

sentences.en: First-run REO tee for the people bringing simple trucks back.
sentences.zh: 首轮 REO T 恤，专为那些将简单卡车带回来的人们而设计。

blocks.html_en: Lightweight technical cap for shop days, trail days, and long hauls.

sentences.en: Lightweight technical cap for shop days, trail days, and long hauls.
sentences.zh: 适合车间、越野和长途旅行的轻质技术帽。

blocks.html_en: Press, suppliers, partners, and the merely curious — we read every message and answer fast. Want a truck? Reserve yours for $25.

sentences.en: Press, suppliers, partners, and the merely curious — we read every message and answer fast.
sentences.zh: 媒体、供应商、合作伙伴以及仅仅是好奇的人——我们会阅读每条消息并快速回复。

content_html_zh:
介绍

快艇

美国新型经济实惠卡车

$21,500+

开放预订 · 25 美元 · 可退款

保留你的位置

车身框架式

建筑学

机械四轮驱动

Drive

汽油 I4

动力总成

6 速 MT / AT

传播

~600 英里/罐

Range

500,000 mi

动力总成寿命

美国德克萨斯州

集会

没有经销商

Sales

小跑T4X

三种变体。 一个平台。

Seats

2

Doors

2

签名

钢制侧翻平板车

开始

$21,500

我们要去哪里。

  1. 现在预订开放 25 美元即可保留席位 — 可全额退款。 根据预约时间设定位置。
  2. 2026 年第 4 季度车型揭晓生产设计和完整阵容已揭晓 - 准确了解您所预订的内容。
  3. 2027Pilot 建造和验证预生产卡车按照联邦标准建造、测试和认证。
  4. 2028订单簿和配置器预订按优先顺序转换为订单 - 配置您的订单，最早的第一个。
  5. 2028 年末 / 2029 年首次交付卡车按预订顺序到达车道。 最早进、最先出。

时间表目标 · 可能会发生变化

01动力总成

为什么选择天然气

售出的新车中 90% 仍然使用汽油——这就是我们所生产的产品。 迟到是故意的：经过验证的技术优于最新的技术，以更低的价格将更多卡车交到更多美国人手中。

~600 英里航程 · 5 分钟加油

02工程

设计可靠性

这不是一种复古的翻版——一种全新的车辆，只有一个最重要的限制：可靠性。 自然吸气式四轮驱动、车身框架式机械四轮驱动车，行驶里程超过 50 万英里。

500,000 英里动力总成

03接口

物理控制

杠杆、摇杆和真实的模拟仪表。 一个用于诊断和 CarPlay 的小屏幕——仅此而已。 没有订阅。 没有功能锁。 曾经。

机械第一舱

04所有权

修理权

使用常用工具可在五分钟内完成每个面板的安装。 在 30 美元的扫描仪上进行简单的英语诊断。 价格公道的 20 年公共零件目录。 没有零件配对——以书面形式。

业主可维修

没有经销商

网上直接销售。 没有经销商加价或不必要的费用。

没有经销商意味着您口袋里有更多钱

06起源

建于德克萨斯州

在美国设计、认证和组装。 故事不是徽章——而是供应链，在工厂门口都是如此。

32.7767° N · 96.7970° W

REO 的一封信

买家并没有离开。 产品做到了。

美国市场上缺少一种车辆——足够小，足以容纳一个真正的车库，足够便宜，可以跳过七年期贷款，建造得足够好，可以比它更耐用。 这就是我们让 REO 回来建造它的原因。

120 多年来一直在酝酿的遗产。

  1. 1901 兰塞姆·E. 奥兹制造了 Curved Dash Runabout——美国第一辆量产汽车。 650 美元，今天约 25,000 美元。
  2. 1905 年，奥兹被赶出奥兹莫比尔，并以自己名字的首字母缩写创立了 REO。
  3. 1915 年 REO Speed Wagon 面世——现代皮卡的鼻祖。
  4. 1975REO 在诚实的美国卡车七十年后关闭。
  5. 2026REO 回归，打造无人能敌的经济实惠的美国卡车。

直接零件 + OEM 赞助的社区

还没有一家汽车制造商这样做过——而这正是问题所在。 我们是第一个将零部件和社区公开的人，因为这辆卡车应该属于驾驶它的人，而不是建立在看门人基础上的利润机器。 我们通过透明度和双向关系来赚钱。 在这里，OEM 是您的朋友。

01 · 市场

直接零件

有权维修，备货。

  • 经过审查的卖家——通过我们的流程获得批准，而不是最高出价者。
  • 实际价格，公布的汇率。 没有经销商把关，没有零件配对。
  • 公共目录保修 20 年，直接出售给业主。

02·社区

业主俱乐部

由我们来运行。 我们实际上在听。

  • 我们拥有并管理的论坛，而不是被忽视的 Facebook 群组。
  • 业主决定我们接下来要建造什么；最好的想法船。
  • 团队在公开场合、记录在案的诚实回答。
